purpose.description: The purpose of this characteristic, for example used for MINVALUE or MAXVALUE of bucket etc.

items.description: String max 256 characters.

value.description: This is the condition attribute value.

items.description: The versions of the value.

value.description: The value.

unitOfMeasure.description: The unit of measure of the value.

dimensionSpecificationId.description: Reference to the DimensionSpecification this Dimension has a relation to.

externalId.description: Identifier of the entity in an external system.

specCharacteristic.description: A characteristic quality or distinctive feature of a product offering price.

items.description: SpecCharacteristic is a structure for characteristic specifications.

externalId.description: Identifier of the SpecCharacteristic in an external system.

name.description: Name given to this SpecCharacteristic. Not guaranteed to be unique.

description.description: A narrative that explains in detail what the specCharacteristic is.

valueType.description: A kind of value that the characteristic can take on, such as numeric, text and so forth.

minCardinality.description: The minimum number of instances a CharacteristicValue can take on.

maxCardinality.description: The maximum number of instances a CharacteristicValue can take on.

purpose.description: The purpose of this characteristic, for example used for MINVALUE or MAXVALUE of bucket etc.

measure.description: This is used to set the measure of the characteristic values, such as Data or weight or length etc. The UnitOfMeasure at characteristicValue then has actual UOM such as KB, MB or MG, KG, etc.

sensitiveType.description: The value for the Decryption sensitiveType

items.description: A number or text that can be assigned to a SpecCharacteristic.

externalId.description: Identifier of the SpecCharacteristic in an external system.

name.description: Name given to this SpecCharacteristic. Not guaranteed to be unique.

description.description: A narrative that explains in detail what the SpecCharacteristicValue is.

valueType.description: The kind of value the characteristic can take on, for example, Duration, KiloGrams, Data, Volume etc.

isDefault.description: Indicates if the value is the default value for a characteristic.

value.description: A discrete value that the characteristic can take on.

externalId.description: Identifier of the target in an external system.

unitOfMeasure.description: The unit in which the characteristicSpecValue is measured, such as KB, MB, Mins, Kgm etc.

valueFrom.description: The low range value that a characteristic can take on.

valueTo.description: The upper range value a characteristic that can take on.

externalId.description: Identifier of the target in an external system.

rangeInterval.description: An indicator that specifies the inclusion or exclusion of the valueFrom and valueTo attributes. Only possible value is CLOSED.

specCharRelationship.description: Relationships between/among specCharacteristics or entity specification.

items.description: An relationship between/among specCharacteristics or entity specification.

id.description: Unique identifier of the target SpecCharacteristic or entity specification.

externalId.description: Identifier of the target SpecCharacteristic or entity specification in an external system.

name.description: Name given to the target SpecCharacteristic or entity specification. Not guaranteed to be unique.

nextRelation.description: The next relation in the chain.

inheritanceAction.description: Inheritance action for the specification characteristic

partyRoleInvolvementGroupRef.description: Identifier of the party role involvement group in an external system.

productOfferingPolicyRef.description: List of all productOfferingPolicyRef linked to this productOffering.

items.description: Product offering policy ref structure.

id.description: Unique identifier of the product offering policy ref.

externalId.description: Identifier of the product offering policy ref in an external system.

name.description: Name given to this product offering policy ref. Not guaranteed to be unique.

externalId.description: External id of the target specification.

name.description: Name given to the target specification. Not guaranteed to be unique.

externalId.description: Identifier of the specification in an external system.

name.description: Name given to this specification. Not guaranteed to be unique.

description.description: Description of this specification.

validFor.description: StartDateTime must be earlier than EndDateTime.

startDateTime.description: Start dateTime of the time period. The value is inclusive, including the starting point of the interval. The pattern is based on the definition found at http://www.w3.org/TR/xmlschema-2/#dateTime.

endDateTime.description: End dateTime of the time period. The value is exclusive, excluding the ending point of the interval. The pattern is based on the definition found at http://www.w3.org/TR/xmlschema-2/#dateTime.

lastUpdate.description: Date and time of the last update of this specification.

lifecycleStatus.description: Used to indicate the current lifecycle status of this specification.

specCharacteristic.description: A characteristic quality or distinctive feature of an EntitySpecification. The characteristic can be take on a discrete value, such as color, can take on a range of values, (for example, sensitivity of 100-240 mV).

items.description: SpecCharacteristic is a structure for characteristic specifications.

externalId.description: Identifier of the SpecCharacteristic in an external system.

name.description: Name given to this SpecCharacteristic. Not guaranteed to be unique.

description.description: A narrative that explains in detail what the specCharacteristic is.

valueType.description: A kind of value that the characteristic can take on, such as numeric, text and so forth.

minCardinality.description: The minimum number of instances a CharacteristicValue can take on.

maxCardinality.description: The maximum number of instances a CharacteristicValue can take on.

purpose.description: The purpose of this characteristic, for example used for MINVALUE or MAXVALUE of bucket etc.

measure.description: This is used to set the measure of the characteristic values, such as Data or weight or length etc. The UnitOfMeasure at characteristicValue then has actual UOM such as KB, MB or MG, KG, etc.

sensitiveType.description: The value for the Decryption sensitiveType
